title: FIND VA LOCATIONS - 211info
text: UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF VETERANS AFFAIRS FIND VA LOCATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on VA locations, including VA health, emergency care, VA benefits, and Vet Centers (which offer individual and group counseling). Also provides locations for in-network community care providers, pharmacies, and urgent care for same-day care for minor illnesses or injuries. Locator also includes National Cemeteries. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable (866) 620-2071 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (866) 620-2071 Urgent Care Support Line INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies by service. VA co-payment may apply. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Veterans Emergency Room Care * Veterans General Medical Care * Veterans Group Counseling * Veterans Individual Counseling * Veterans National Cemeteries Urgent Care Centers Veteran Outpatient Clinics * Veterans If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
